title: Caplet file frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for a Markdown Caplet file.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema for editor validation.

description.description: Compact capability description shown before the full Caplet card is disclosed.

tags.description: Optional tags for grouping or searching Caplets.

exposure.description: How this Caplet is exposed to agents.

shadowing.description: Whether attached local Caplets may shadow this remote Caplet ID.

useWhen.description: When agents should prefer this Caplet or configured action.

avoidWhen.description: When agents should avoid this Caplet or configured action.

label.description: Human-readable setup or verification step label.

command.description: Executable command to spawn without a shell.

label.description: Human-readable setup or verification step label.

command.description: Executable command to spawn without a shell.

setup.description: Optional explicit setup and verification metadata for this Caplet.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

icon.description: Optional catalog presentation icon. Use an HTTPS image URL or a bundled image path relative to this Caplet directory. Values must not use credentials, local or absolute paths, path traversal, query strings, fragments, or private hosts.

catalog.description: Optional presentation metadata for public catalog surfaces.

transport.description: Downstream MCP transport. Defaults to stdio when command is present.

args.description: Arguments passed to the stdio command.

env.description: Environment variables for stdio servers. Supports ${VAR} and $env:VAR.

url.description: Remote MCP server URL for http or sse transport.

auth.description: Authentication settings for a remote MCP server.

startupTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for starting or checking a downstream server.

callTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for downstream tool calls.

toolCacheTtlMs.description: Milliseconds downstream tool metadata stays fresh. Set 0 to refresh every time.

disabled.description: When true, omit this Caplet from discovery and do not start its MCP server.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

mcpServer.description: MCP server backend configuration for this Caplet.

baseUrl.description: Override base URL for OpenAPI requests.

auth.description: Explicit OpenAPI request auth config. Use {"type":"none"} for public APIs.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for OpenAPI HTTP requests.

operationCacheTtlMs.description: Milliseconds OpenAPI operation metadata stays fresh. Set 0 to refresh every time.

disabled.description: When true, omit this Caplet from discovery.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

openapiEndpoint.description: OpenAPI endpoint backend configuration for this Caplet.

baseUrl.description: Override base URL for Google API requests.

auth.description: Explicit Google API request auth config. Use {"type":"none"} for public APIs.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for Google API HTTP requests.

operationCacheTtlMs.description: Milliseconds Google Discovery operation metadata stays fresh. Set 0 to refresh every time.

disabled.description: When true, omit this Caplet from discovery.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

googleDiscoveryApi.description: Google Discovery API backend configuration for this Caplet.

schemaPath.description: Local GraphQL SDL or introspection path.

schemaUrl.description: Remote GraphQL SDL or introspection URL.

operations.description: Configured GraphQL operations keyed by stable tool name.

documentPath.description: Path to a GraphQL operation document.

useWhen.description: When agents should prefer this Caplet or configured action.

avoidWhen.description: When agents should avoid this Caplet or configured action.

auth.description: Explicit GraphQL request auth config. Use {"type":"none"} for public APIs.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for GraphQL HTTP requests.

operationCacheTtlMs.description: Milliseconds GraphQL operation metadata stays fresh. Set 0 to refresh every time.

selectionDepth.description: Maximum depth for auto-generated GraphQL selection sets.

disabled.description: When true, omit this Caplet from discovery.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

graphqlEndpoint.description: GraphQL endpoint backend configuration for this Caplet.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for HTTP action requests.

auth.description: Explicit HTTP API request auth config. Use {"type":"none"} for public APIs.

method.description: HTTP method used for this action.

path.description: URL path appended to the HTTP API baseUrl.

useWhen.description: When agents should prefer this Caplet or configured action.

avoidWhen.description: When agents should avoid this Caplet or configured action.

actions.description: Configured HTTP actions keyed by stable tool name.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for HTTP action requests.

maxResponseBytes.description: Maximum HTTP action response body bytes to read.

disabled.description: When true, omit this Caplet from discovery.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

httpApi.description: HTTP API backend configuration for this Caplet.

useWhen.description: When agents should prefer this Caplet or configured action.

avoidWhen.description: When agents should avoid this Caplet or configured action.

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema for structuredContent returned by this action.

command.description: Executable command to spawn without a shell.

actions.description: Configured CLI actions keyed by stable tool name.

cwd.description: Default working directory for CLI actions.

disabled.description: When true, omit this Caplet from discovery.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

cliTools.description: CLI tools backend configuration for this Caplet.

disabled.description: When true, omit this Caplet from discovery.

projectBinding.description: Project Binding requirements for Caplets that need an attached project.

runtime.description: Runtime feature and resource requirements for hosted execution.

capletSet.description: Nested Caplet collection backend configuration for this Caplet.
